name: gorgias-pp-mcp
description: Agent-native Gorgias support CLI with ticket triage, local sync, search, analytics, and MCP orchestration.

gorgias_api_key.title: GORGIAS_API_KEY
gorgias_api_key.description: Sets GORGIAS_API_KEY for the Gorgias MCP server. Create one in Gorgias Settings -> Account -> REST API.

gorgias_base_url.title: GORGIAS_BASE_URL
gorgias_base_url.description: Sets the tenant API URL, for example https://your-tenant.gorgias.com/api.

gorgias_username.title: GORGIAS_USERNAME
gorgias_username.description: Sets GORGIAS_USERNAME for HTTP Basic auth.
